description: Creates a button that calls a backend AI math endpoint and replays commands with the response. On click: collects all param() key-value pairs, POSTs to /api/math/{actionName} with the params as the request body, and replays the referenced command variables with the response data.
utility: Create an AI-powered action button for math operations

arguments.name: params
arguments.description: Key-value parameters sent to the backend. Value can be a string literal or a variable reference (resolved to its value). Multiple param() sub-expressions allowed.

arguments.name: commandRefs
arguments.description: Command variables to replay after the API response returns

arguments.name: displayLabel
arguments.description: Button label text (default: 'Run'). Supports two values: display("label", "playingLabel") for different text while running.

arguments.name: playMode
arguments.description: How to replay referenced commands. Default: sequence for 1 command, parallel for multiple.

arguments.name: duration
arguments.description: Animation duration for the replayed commands

examples.expression:
W = write(at(2, 2), "2x + 3 = 7")
inputaiaction(at(4, 2), "solve", param("expression", "2x + 3 = 7"), W, display("Solve"))

eq1 = "x^2 - 4"
W = write(at(2, 2), eq1)
inputaiaction(at(4, 2), "factor", param("expression", eq1), W, display("Factor"))

examples.scenario: Simplify with parallel replay and custom duration
examples.expression: inputaiaction(at(5, 10), "simplify", param("expression", "(x^2-1)/(x-1)"), A, B, type(parallel), t(2), display("Simplify", "Simplifying..."))
